summary: Classified the ten live inventory PRs independently. The artifact reports no security-sensitive items. No close, merge, fix, or raise-PR action is allowed for this job, so ready or technically ambiguous PRs are routed to maintainer review and proof/check-blocked PRs are kept open.

actions.reason: Focused open PR with passing proof but an unresolved ClawSweeper needs-changes review; maintainer judgment is required and this job cannot repair or merge it.
Small focused PR, but the hydrated maintainer rebase note and maintainer-review gate require human follow-up.
Keep open as a related release-guard follow-up; proof and checks block any stronger action.
The actionable Codex review finding and proof gate need human or author follow-up; this worker cannot repair the branch.
Compatibility-affecting focused feature PR with green checks; maintainer product/API judgment is required.
Open focused config/gateway PR has maintainer signal, a dirty merge state, and a needs-changes review; human follow-up is required because repair/merge is disallowed.
Focused A2A fix with proof and author follow-up, but maintainer review and branch freshness remain required.
Keep open as related session-lock work; proof failure prevents fixed-by/closure or merge-style routing.
Ready focused bug fix with green proof/checks; maintainer technical review is the next required step.
Keep open as related session-lock work; proof failure and no merge/fix permission block stronger action.

needs_human: #82870: maintainer decision needed after ClawSweeper needs-changes review on a focused green PR.
#82909: maintainer rebase note and maintainer-review gate remain unresolved.
#82972: actionable Codex review comment about channel-move schema grouping remains unresolved.
#83041: dirty merge state plus needs-changes review and maintainer signal require human follow-up.
